title: Decorative live badges on static marketing surfaces
sourceLocation: Independent review of synthetic and publicly visible AI-generated landing-page samples
summary: Static marketing pages frequently use a green LIVE badge as generic technological decoration even when no live process, broadcast, or real-time state exists.
supportingClaims: The design problem is the mismatch between the displayed state and the product behavior, not the word live by itself.
Literal live states require control examples so a detector does not suppress valid operational status information.

independence.notes: Original observation recorded for clean-room proposal development.
